name: Banana Oat Cookies
recipeIngredient: 4-7 cups any combination of: raisins and/or dates
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the mashed bananas, caster sugar, and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg replacer and water to the mixture, stirring thoroughly.
3. Incorporate vanilla extract, salt, baking soda, flour, and oats into the banana mixture in three additions, mixing at medium speed after each addition.
4. Gently fold in any raisins or dates if using.
5. Scoop golf ball-sized portions of dough onto a greased baking sheet, spacing them 2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 8-10 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly browned and set.
7. Allow the cookies to cool completely before eating.
